title: Pre-OSU Summer 2021 To-Dos — Diana Hoff, Therapist, Python, OSU Transcripts
html:
TL;DR

  • Pre-OSU summer 2021 admin sweep — wheel replaced, car cleaned, Mr. Barrett contacted, Rainie Falls trip done, ask John about last day at work, ask mom about a therapist (✅), set up python self-study, cancel and replace card / maybe even credit card.
  • The therapist line is the load-bearing one: this is the summer Yahir first formalizes mental-health support — the same therapist thread reappears in the April 2021 Ford prep note ("have dad send a mail to therapist").
  • Lola (the family dog) gets a wash on the list — small but confirms the consistent dog-care pattern across the corpus.
  • Plans to "buy tickets with Dave" — likely David (the long-standing friend Yahir checks in with regularly per the existing entity stub).
  • Last item: "send high school transcripts to OSU" — bureaucratic gate to college matriculation. This note dates the official handoff from Grants Pass teen era to OSU undergrad.
  • Captured July 6, 2021, same day as the Renaissance gratitude letter draft — high admin-density day.

Key quotes

"ask mom about a therapist ✅"

"send high school transcripts to OSU"

Open questions

  • Diana Hoff — single mention here, identity unclear (possibly a Ford or JCEF contact). Stub gate not crossed.
  • Mr. Barrett — same; one mention.
  • Did the python self-study stick? The 2020 summer prep also has "start python" as an item — recurring intention, no clear ship.

Connections
